name: Waste Management, Inc.
description: Waste Management, Inc., doing business as WM, is the leading provider of comprehensive waste management and environmental services in North America. Headquartered in Houston, Texas, the company offers a wide range of solutions, including garbage collection, recycling, and dumpster rental services for residential, commercial, and industrial customers. With a commitment to sustainability and environmental stewardship, WM operates an extensive network of landfills, transfer stations, and recycling facilities, serving millions of customers across the United States and Canada to manage waste effectively and promote a circular economy.
